seo.title: AB Carriers — Freight & Logistics | Birgunj to Biratnagar, Nepal
seo.description: AB Carriers provides Full Truckload, Partial Load, and Express Cargo services along the Birgunj–Biratnagar corridor in Nepal. Over 20 years of trusted freight on the Mahendra Rajmarg.
seo.keywords: AB Carriers Nepal, freight Birgunj Biratnagar, cargo Nepal Terai, truck logistics Nepal, Mahendra Rajmarg freight, full truckload Nepal, partial load Terai, express cargo Birgunj
seo.og_title: AB Carriers — Nepal's Terai Freight Company
seo.og_description: Three 6-wheel trucks. 20+ years on road. Daily freight runs from Birgunj to Biratnagar along Nepal's Mahendra Rajmarg.

hero.body: Three trusted trucks. Over 20 years on the Mahendra Rajmarg. AB Carriers delivers Full, Partial, and Express freight from Birgunj to Biratnagar — every working day, without excuses.

services.section_sub: We keep it focused — Full Load, Partial Load, and Express. Every service runs on 20 years of road knowledge between Birgunj and Biratnagar.

items.name: Full Truckload
items.description: Your cargo takes the whole truck. No co-loading, no waiting for other consignments. The vehicle goes when you say — direct Birgunj to Biratnagar and return.

items.name: Partial Load
items.description: Share the truck — pay only for the space your goods occupy. Ideal for traders and businesses that move regular but smaller volumes along the corridor.

items.name: Express Cargo
items.description: Time-sensitive shipments dispatched same day. Priority loading, minimal stops, overnight delivery. For goods that cannot wait until the next morning's run.

routes.section_sub: One main corridor along the Mahendra Rajmarg. Drops begin from Hariyon and Lalbandi onwards — no earlier stops on outbound runs.
routes.drop_policy_note: Goods are accepted for delivery from Hariyon / Lalbandi onwards. No drops before these points on outbound runs.
routes.return_body: The return route — Biratnagar to Birgunj — operates as Full Truckload only. This service is designed for industries, manufacturers, and bulk traders moving goods westward toward Birgunj and the India border.
routes.return_body2: Partial and Express are not available on the return direction. Contact us to reserve the full truck.

fleet.section_sub: A compact, well-maintained fleet — each truck a proven workhorse on Nepal's Terai roads for over two decades.

vehicles.description: Primary full-load vehicle. Runs the full Birgunj–Biratnagar corridor daily. Used for FTL and dedicated return runs for industrial clients.
Shared and express runs. Handles Partial Load consolidations and same-day Express cargo across the corridor.
Reserve and overflow vehicle. Deployed on peak days, double runs, and dedicated industrial return loads from Biratnagar.

items.title: Over 20 Years
items.description: Two decades operating the Birgunj – Biratnagar corridor. We know every road condition, every checkpoint, every season.

items.title: On-Time Runs
items.description: Our schedule is our commitment. Daily departures leave on the hour — weather, traffic, and border conditions considered.

items.title: Honest Pricing
items.description: We quote once, we charge once. No fuel surcharges added after the fact. No surprise handling fees at delivery.

items.title: Direct Communication
items.description: One phone call to either office. You speak to the team, not a call centre. Shipment updates on request, any time.

cta.subline: Call our Birgunj office or send a quote request — we respond same day.

contact.intro: Two offices. One direct line. AB Carriers has been a name traders trust across the Birgunj–Biratnagar corridor for over 20 years.
contact.form_success: ✓ Request sent — we'll call you shortly.

footer.tagline: Freight & logistics along Nepal's Terai corridor — Birgunj to Biratnagar — for over 20 years. Trusted by traders, manufacturers, and businesses across the Madhesh and Koshi provinces.
footer.copyright: © 2026 AB Carriers Pvt. Ltd. All rights reserved.
